{
  "decision": "next",
  "summary": "[已完成] AI监管法规合规研究的万户级配额与节奏计划已制定，并明确了1:10逐级分解口径和回报周期。",
  "updates": {
    "tumen_quota": [
      {
        "tumen_id": "T49zh-Tumen-01",
        "task_name": "EU AI Act 整体框架与立法状态研究",
        "description": "全面调研欧盟AI法案的整体框架、核心原则、主要章节、适用范围以及当前的立法状态（如通过日期、生效阶段）。",
        "target_output": "EU AI Act 整体框架概述",
        "estimated_days": 2
      },
      {
        "tumen_id": "T49zh-Tumen-02",
        "task_name": "AI系统风险分类体系详解",
        "description": "深入研究EU AI Act中定义的AI系统风险分类体系，包括不可接受风险、高风险、有限风险、最小风险的具体定义、判断标准及示例。",
        "target_output": "风险分类体系详解",
        "estimated_days": 2
      },
      {
        "tumen_id": "T49zh-Tumen-03",
        "task_name": "AI客服机器人合规定位与要求",
        "description": "根据风险分类体系，确定AI客服聊天机器人所属的风险等级，并详细研究该风险等级下对应的具体合规义务和要求。",
        "target_output": "AI聊天机器人的合规定位和要求",
        "estimated_days": 3
      },
      {
        "tumen_id": "T49zh-Tumen-04",
        "task_name": "合规时间线与违规处罚研究",
        "description": "调研EU AI Act各阶段的生效日期、过渡期安排，以及违规行为的处罚力度（罚款金额、计算方式、影响因素等）。",
        "target_output": "关键时间节点和合规期限, 违规处罚详情",
        "estimated_days": 2
      },
      {
        "tumen_id": "T49zh-Tumen-05",
        "task_name": "技术合规要求与企业实践建议",
        "description": "研究EU AI Act在技术层面的合规要求（如透明度、人工监督、数据治理、稳健性、安全性等），并搜集企业合规实践案例和准备建议。",
        "target_output": "技术合规要求清单, 建议的合规行动路线图",
        "estimated_days": 3
      }
    ],
    "decomposition_rule": "逐级 1:10 规则：万户级任务将进一步分解为10个千户级子任务，千户级分解为10个百户级，百户级分解为10个十户级，确保任务颗粒度逐级细化，不跳级下达。",
    "reporting_cycle": "万户级每5天提交阶段性进展报告，最终在所有万户级任务完成后，提交一份综合合规评估报告。"
  }
}
```**LLM Running (Turn 2) ...**

tumen_quota.task_name: EU AI Act 整体框架与立法状态研究
tumen_quota.description: 全面调研欧盟AI法案的整体框架、核心原则、主要章节、适用范围以及当前的立法状态（如通过日期、生效阶段）。
tumen_quota.target_output: EU AI Act 整体框架概述

tumen_quota.task_name: AI系统风险分类体系详解
tumen_quota.description: 深入研究EU AI Act中定义的AI系统风险分类体系，包括不可接受风险、高风险、有限风险、最小风险的具体定义、判断标准及示例。

tumen_quota.task_name: AI客服机器人合规定位与要求
tumen_quota.description: 根据风险分类体系，确定AI客服聊天机器人所属的风险等级，并详细研究该风险等级下对应的具体合规义务和要求。
tumen_quota.target_output: AI聊天机器人的合规定位和要求

tumen_quota.task_name: 合规时间线与违规处罚研究
tumen_quota.description: 调研EU AI Act各阶段的生效日期、过渡期安排，以及违规行为的处罚力度（罚款金额、计算方式、影响因素等）。
tumen_quota.target_output: 关键时间节点和合规期限, 违规处罚详情

tumen_quota.task_name: 技术合规要求与企业实践建议
tumen_quota.description: 研究EU AI Act在技术层面的合规要求（如透明度、人工监督、数据治理、稳健性、安全性等），并搜集企业合规实践案例和准备建议。
tumen_quota.target_output: 技术合规要求清单, 建议的合规行动路线图

updates.decomposition_rule: 逐级 1:10 规则：万户级任务将进一步分解为10个千户级子任务，千户级分解为10个百户级，百户级分解为10个十户级，确保任务颗粒度逐级细化，不跳级下达。

mingghan_allocations.title: EU AI Act Framework & Status
mingghan_allocations.description: Research and summarize the overall framework and current legislative status of the EU AI Act.

mingghan_allocations.title: AI Risk Classification System
mingghan_allocations.description: Detail the EU AI Act's risk classification system (unacceptable, high, limited, minimal risk).

mingghan_allocations.title: AI Chatbot Risk Level Determination
mingghan_allocations.description: Analyze and determine the specific risk level for AI customer service chatbots under the EU AI Act.

mingghan_allocations.title: AI Chatbot Compliance Obligations
mingghan_allocations.description: Identify and list the specific compliance obligations for AI customer service chatbots based on their determined risk level.

mingghan_allocations.title: EU AI Act Compliance Timeline
mingghan_allocations.description: Research and outline the key compliance timelines and effective dates of the EU AI Act.

mingghan_allocations.title: Non-Compliance Penalties Analysis
mingghan_allocations.description: Investigate and detail the penalties for non-compliance with the EU AI Act, including fine structures and calculation methods.

mingghan_allocations.title: Technical Compliance: Transparency & Oversight
mingghan_allocations.description: Research technical compliance requirements focusing on transparency, human oversight, and robustness.

mingghan_allocations.title: Technical Compliance: Data Governance & Security
mingghan_allocations.description: Research technical compliance requirements focusing on data governance, data quality, and cybersecurity aspects.

mingghan_allocations.title: Corporate Compliance Best Practices
mingghan_allocations.description: Identify and summarize best practices and preparation advice for companies to achieve EU AI Act compliance.

mingghan_allocations.title: EU AI Act Compliance Report Generation
mingghan_allocations.description: Compile all researched information into a comprehensive compliance assessment report as specified by the user.

meta.stage_description: 万户级执行并向下分解到千户级。

jaghun_allocations.title: Research EU AI Act Overall Framework and Legislative Status
jaghun_allocations.description: Research and document the overall framework, key principles, and current legislative status of the European Union AI Act, including its objectives and scope.

jaghun_allocations.title: Detail AI System Risk Classification System
jaghun_allocations.description: Provide a detailed explanation of the AI system risk classification system under the EU AI Act, covering unacceptable risk, high-risk, limited risk, and minimal risk categories.

jaghun_allocations.title: Determine AI Chatbot Risk Classification
jaghun_allocations.description: Analyze the characteristics of AI customer service chatbots and determine their specific risk classification (e.g., high-risk, limited risk) according to the EU AI Act criteria.

jaghun_allocations.title: Identify AI Chatbot Compliance Obligations
jaghun_allocations.description: Based on the determined risk classification, identify and detail the specific compliance obligations and requirements for AI customer service chatbots under the EU AI Act.

jaghun_allocations.title: Document EU AI Act Compliance Timeline
jaghun_allocations.description: Research and document the key compliance timelines, including effective dates and transitional periods for various provisions of the EU AI Act.

jaghun_allocations.title: Research EU AI Act Violation Penalties
jaghun_allocations.description: Investigate and detail the penalties for non-compliance with the EU AI Act, including potential fine amounts and the methods for their calculation.

jaghun_allocations.title: Research Technical Compliance: Transparency and Explainability
jaghun_allocations.description: Research and document technical compliance requirements related to transparency, explainability, and robustness for AI systems as stipulated by the EU AI Act.

jaghun_allocations.title: Research Technical Compliance: Human Oversight and Data Governance
jaghun_allocations.description: Research and document technical compliance requirements related to human oversight, data governance, data quality, and cybersecurity for AI systems under the EU AI Act.

jaghun_allocations.title: Summarize Corporate Compliance Practices and Recommendations
jaghun_allocations.description: Collect and summarize examples of corporate compliance practices and preparation recommendations for companies affected by the EU AI Act.

jaghun_allocations.title: Propose Preliminary Compliance Action Roadmap
jaghun_allocations.description: Synthesize all research findings to propose a preliminary compliance action roadmap for the company's AI customer service system, addressing key steps and considerations.

meta.stage_description: 千户级执行并向下分解到百户级。
